name: Kenyon Smith
subtitle: Experiential Design & Direction
bio: Kenyon Q. Smith is a creative exploring experiential activations, exhibitions and fabrication through both collaborative and individual exploration. His mission is to discover and translate ideas into images, objects, and experiences that are thoughtful, engaging, and challenging.

After studying both Sculpture and Graphic Design. He moved west before settling in NYC. He’s helped finesse packaging for Soylent and others, created displays for Helmut Lang, and designed experiential activations for a range of clients, corporate to cultural.

education.text: Bachelor of Fine Arts, Savannah College of Art & Design
Bachelor of Placeholder (Visual Arts), College Name
